name: Portuguese-Style Spicy Shrimp
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds jumbo shrimp, peeled and deveined
1 tablespoon finely minced fresh red cayenne chilies, seeded
1/2 cup extra-virgin olive oil (preferably imported from Portugal)
red hot pepper sauce to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a glass baking dish, toss the shrimp with the garlic, chilies, and olive oil.
2. Cover and refrigerate for at least 24 hours.
3. Preheat grill or broiler.
4. Cook shrimp, brushing occasionally with marinade, for 2 to 3 minutes per side.
5. In a small bowl, stir together 1/2 cup olive oil and red hot pepper sauce to taste.
6. Serve the hot grilled shrimp with the dipping sauce.
Yield: 4 servings
